data.name: Succubus Harem
data.detailed_description:
- This game offers full compatibility between mouse & keyboard, gamepad controls, and VR operation. You can enjoy the entire experience without a VR setup. -

Endless Encounters. Infinite Desire. Build the Harem of Your Dreams.

Succubi of every shape, size, and flavor await—each with their own seductive charm. From faces and hairstyles to height, curves, skin tones, and sultry eyes, every detail is yours to indulge in. Find the ones that match your deepest cravings, and create the ultimate harem tailored to your taste.

Touch. Tease. Take Control. — Unleash Unlimited Freedom with Full Physics

No pre-made animations—just pure, reactive motion. Thanks to full physics simulation, every movement is fluid, unique, and deliciously unpredictable. Summon as many succubi as your machine can handle, then grab, pose, and position them exactly how you like using nothing but your mouse. Every interaction is yours to command.

She Thinks. She Feels. She Wants You. — Succubi with Minds of Their Own

These aren’t mindless dolls. Each succubus roams the map on her own, guided by goal-driven AI. She’ll seductively engage enemies, drift through danger, and at times come running back to you—needing your help, your touch. Her expressions shift with the moment, adding raw emotion and irresistible allure to her every move.

Shed Reality. Slip into Pleasure. — Instantly Switch Between Display and VR

Start in the comfort of your screen, then dive deep into a world of sensual VR with a single touch. Switch freely at any time—no interruptions, no limits. Seamless controls let you surrender to a pleasure-rich fantasy whenever the urge strikes.

* When playing in VR, the game is designed for seated play. A head-mounted display replaces the monitor, and a single VR controller is used instead of a keyboard and mouse.

Story — The Slick Rescue of Desire Begins.

You’re a carefree slime, enjoying steamy days with your playful succubi. But everything changes when a dark realm engulfs their village. Only a teleport crystal remains. Now, it’s up to you to bring them back—one by one—and rebuild your dripping, decadent harem.

data.short_description: Succubus Harem is a fully 3D sexual simulator where everything moves with real-time physics. You become a slime—able to slip, slide, and squeeze into any place you desire. Choose your favorite succubi, your favorite angles, and enjoy total freedom as you explore your own personal harem.
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 64-bit Windows 10 RS4+
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 8500 / AMD Ryzen 5 3400G
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 / Radeon RX 560X
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: OpenXR -requires motion controllers.
  • 備註: VR Minimal Requirements: CPU: Intel 6-core i7-8700 / AMD Ryzen 7 2700 GPU: NVIDIA RTX 2070 / AMD RX 5700XT

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 64-bit Windows 10 RS4+
  • Processor: Intel Core i5 8500 / AMD Ryzen 5 3400G
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 / Radeon RX 560X
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
  • VR Support: OpenXR -requires motion controllers.
  • Additional Notes: VR Minimal Requirements: CPU: Intel 6-core i7-8700 / AMD Ryzen 7 2700 GPU: NVIDIA RTX 2070 / AMD RX 5700XT
